basics.name: Qianqian Wan
basics.label: Postdoctoral Researcher
basics.summary: I study how attention shapes knowledge construction across development using behavioral experiments, immersive virtual reality, and neuroimaging.

work.name: Center for Mind and Brain & Center for Neuroscience, UC Davis
work.summary: Leading a multi-session fMRI study examining how goal-directed attention during navigation shapes spatial learning. Developed immersive VR paradigm tracking body, head, and eye movements during naturalistic exploration.

work.name: The Ohio State University
work.summary: Designed novel behavioral paradigms investigating attention, working memory, and category learning. Published findings in Psychological Science and Journal of Experimental Psychology: General.

education.institution: The Ohio State University, Columbus, OH
University of Hong Kong, Hong Kong
